prompt: Design a weekly group Bible study rhythm inside Reveal’s community.
method: constitution-bound expand simulation (same packs/contracts/evidence as forge expand-node; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)

nodes.label: Spiritual posture first
nodes.details: Rhythm exists for communal formation — hearts oriented together — not content completion.

nodes.label: Invitation vs dump
nodes.details: Tone of every week: come as you are; invitation, not a syllabus dump.
nodes.strategicAnswer: form people, not dump content. Invitation tone.

nodes.label: Money meets faith story
nodes.details: Study connects Scripture to honest money courage without prosperity gloss or shame.

nodes.label: Reject engagement gospel
nodes.details: If success becomes attendance metrics, the spiritual posture is hollowed.

nodes.label: Weekly formation arc
nodes.details: Each week is a chapter in becoming a woman who can talk about money without fear.
